content: هِييَ سِبْتُه عِلاَوَةً عَلَى كِدَةٍ خَدِّتْ عَرَبِيَّتُه
translations: eng:she left him, moreover she took his car

transcriptions.arabizi: hiyya sibit|uh Ailaewa Aala kida chaddit Aarabiyit|uh
